# Toyota Runtime Federation Workspace
Federation Coordination / Collapse Observatory / Runtime Workspace

# ▶ OPEN FLEET RUNTIME

### Dispatch / Queue / ETA Runtime

[### OPEN RUNTIME →](https://fleet-operations-console.base44.app)

Runtime domain for dispatch execution, queue pressure, ETA generation, and provider comparison.

# ▶ OPEN URBAN RUNTIME

### ODD / Constraint Runtime

[### OPEN RUNTIME →](https://urban-operation-console.base44.app)

Runtime domain for ODD, weather, traffic, urban load, and constraint propagation.

# ▶ OPEN NODE RUNTIME

### Energy / Capacity Runtime

[### OPEN RUNTIME →](https://service-hub-console.base44.app)

Runtime domain for H2, SOC, berth, charging, acceptance, and node capacity.

# ▶ OPEN LIFE RUNTIME

### Wallet / Settlement / Subscription Runtime

[### OPEN RUNTIME →](https://life-runtime.base44.app)

Runtime domain for wallet, settlement, subscription, shared transaction, and life synchronization.
